leadText: The Pure Incense (Japanese: きよめのおこう Purify Incense) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It allows Chimecho to produce Chingling Eggs. In the overworld, its effect is identical to the Cleanse Tag.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In the overworld [ edit | edit source ] If held by the first member in the player 's party , it lowers the encounter rate of wild Pokémon by a third. Breeding [ edit | edit source ] If held by either parent of a pairing in Pokémon Day Care or the Pokémon Nursery that would produce a Chimecho Egg , a Chingling Egg is produced instead.

sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 An item to be held by a Pokémon. It helps keep wild Pokémon away if the holder is the first one in the party. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. It helps keep wild Pokémon away if the holder is the head of the party. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. It helps keep wild Pokémon away when the holder is the head of the party.
